title: Implement RAG query endpoint and chat UI with source citations
description: Build the streaming RAG endpoint that embeds a user question, retrieves top-k relevant chunks from the matter's documents, and generates a GPT-4o answer with source citations. Display in a chat interface on the matter page.

acceptance_criteria.text: POST /api/chat/[matterId] accepts a question and returns a streamed response
Query is scoped strictly to the current matter's document chunks
Response includes inline citations referencing source document and chunk
Chat UI shows streamed response in real time with a typing indicator
Conversation history stored in ChatMessage table
Rate limited to 10 requests per minute per user

steps: Create lib/ai/rag.ts: embed question, retrieve chunks, build context, stream response
Create app/api/chat/[matterId]/route.ts as a streaming route handler
Add rate limiting middleware using upstash/ratelimit or a simple in-memory counter for v1
Build components/chat/ChatInterface.tsx using Vercel AI SDK useChat hook
Persist question + answer + cited chunk IDs to ChatMessage table
risks: Context window limits — top-k chunk selection must fit within GPT-4o context; implement token budget
Streaming + Prisma async writes — ensure conversation save doesn't block the stream
